name: Lemon Gelato
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the lemon-sugar mixture: Grate the zest of 6 lemons and combine with sugar in a bowl, or use a vegetable peeler to remove 3/4 cup zest from the lemons and process with the sugar in a food processor until finely minced.
2. Set aside.
3. Whisk the egg yolks in a heatproof mixing bowl.
4. In a medium non-aluminum saucepan, combine half-and-half and lemon-sugar mixture.
5. Bring to a simmer, stirring to dissolve the sugar.
6. Remove from heat and slowly whisk hot half-and-half into the egg yolk mixture.
7. Return partially cooked custard to the saucepan and stir constantly over medium-low heat until it coats the back of a spoon (about 5 minutes).
8. Pour hot custard into a bowl without straining and stir in vanilla extract.
9. Cover with plastic wrap directly on the surface to prevent skin from forming.
10. Set at room temperature to cool, or refrigerate for up to 48 hours.
11. Squeeze juice from lemons and stir into cooled custard.
12. Transfer mixture to an ice cream maker and freeze according to manufacturer's instructions.
